description: Level 4 achievement autosave validation trace - post-F5 reload persistence test

traces.notes: Captured immediately after F5 page reload and loading Slot 5 'PR85 Validation'. Confirms Level 4 state persisted across browser refresh. Character: Rogue, SPD 23, INT 1, LCK 2, HP 57 max.

console_helper_used: (() => { const s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('aiVillageRpg_slot_4')); return {xp: s?.player?.xp, level: s?.player?.level, autoSaveReason: s?.autoSaveReason, savedAt: s?.savedAt, pendingLevelUpsLen: Array.isArray(s?.pendingLevelUps) ? s.pendingLevelUps.length : null}; })()
saveCapture_function_used: const saveCapture = (slotKey = 'aiVillageRpg_slot_4', tag = '') => { const s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(slotKey) || 'null'); return {tag, slotKey, timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), level: s?.player?.level ?? null, xp: s?.player?.xp ?? null, phase: s?.phase ?? null, autoSaveReason: s?.autoSaveReason ?? null, pendingLevelUpsLen: Array.isArray(s?.pendingLevelUps) ? s.pendingLevelUps.length : null, locationName: s?.locationName ?? null, battleCount: s?.battle?.count ?? null}; };
